name: ScriptMasterLabs
description: Payment rails and AI-native tools for the agentic web. ScriptMasterLabs builds x402/HTTP-402 micropayment infrastructure for autonomous AI agents (USDC on Base), blockchain payment rails on XRPL and Xahau via Xahau Hooks, MCP server monetization middleware, and institutional-grade Pine Script v6 trading indicators. Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned (SDVO), Kinston NC. Founder: Timothy Walton.

products.name: SML Oracle — APEX ANCHOR MATRIX
products.description: Flagship institutional market-intelligence engine on a proprietary, patent-pending Base-4 fractal grid. Harmonically binds fast trigger sets to macro anchor sets to eliminate false breakouts. Powers squeeze detection, options flow, and high-conviction convergence signals.

products.name: CRAWLTOLL
products.description: One-command x402/HTTP-402 paywall that turns AI scraping into revenue. AI crawlers pay USDC on Base per fetch via X-PAYMENT header; humans browse free. CLI generates llms.txt, agents.json, and robots.txt payment terms. Built-in revenue ledger.

products.name: x402 Paywall (@relayos/mcp-paywall)
products.description: Drop-in x402/HTTP-402 paywall middleware for MCP servers and APIs. AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base. Tiered pricing, loyalty/affiliate ledger, USDC payout via viem.

products.name: Nexus-402
products.description: Autonomous AI agent layer and x402 payment infrastructure hub.

products.name: NeuralOS
products.description: Agentic operating system. Web App and Google Play.

products.name: MasterSheets
products.description: AI-native spreadsheet replacement. BYOK, no subscription, purchaser owns 100% of data.

products.name: Trading Indicators
products.description: Invite-only institutional-grade Pine Script v6 indicators. Squeeze detection, institutional flow, Base-4 Harmonic Fractal Matrix, QUEAD v2.0. AMC, GME, 0DTE.

payment_standards: AP2 / A2A x402 extension (Google Agent Payments Protocol)
